div.p: The Provenance resource can be used for detailed review information, such as when the care team was last reviewed and by whom.

When no patient is specified, CareTeam represents a definitional team rather than an actual CareTeam assembled for an individual. The subject element is omitted, and the resource instead defines a reusable team — organized around a set of participant roles, a condition, program, or organizational unit — that can later be referenced and linked to a specific patient (e.g., via a care plan or encounter) when care is actually provided.
